title: Cute Horrors
description: Created for a YouTube video on Knarfy's Channel. This mod includes some adorable versions of terrifying creatures
body:
# Knarfy's Cute Horrors
Created for Knarfy's YouTube Channel!\
▶ https://www.youtube.com/knarfy

I took your terrifying creature suggestions and made them absolutely adorable!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k199DkivphE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Features:
- Duolingo
  - Forces you to translate something, or you die
- Cleaking
  - I assume they meant "creaking" but now we have something completely different
- The Rake
  - It's a rake
- Fundy, SystemZee, and Knarfy
  - They say some super wild stuff
- Unsubscribe
  - Can be banished with the subscribe button
- Partygoers
  - HAPPY BIRTHDAY OR CELEBRATION OR WHATEVER
- Slender Man
  - Give him some googly eyes and he won't be so spooky
- Siren Head
  - We turned him into flower head, and he gives you flowers now. SO SCARY
- Dark Knarfy
  - Don't look into his glowing eyes for too long
- Wendigo
  - Scariest creature in this entire mod... also you can shear the skull off
- You
  - yikes
- Mothman
  - obsessed with light blocks and items

**This mod requires Geckolib for the custom animations!**
